stories.title: The Lost Gear
sentences: Once upon a time, a clever little robot named Pip lost his shiny blue gear in the Whispering Woods.
Pip searched under giant mushroom houses and behind sparkling waterfalls, but the gear was nowhere to be found.
Suddenly, a friendly firefly named Flicker offered to help. "I saw something shiny near the Crystal Cave!" she buzzed.
Together, they ventured deep into the glowing cave, where the walls sparkled like a thousand stars.
At the heart of the cave, Pip found his gear resting on a bed of luminous crystals. His adventure had just begun!

questions.question: What colour was Pip the Robot's lost gear?
Who offered to help Pip search?
Where did Pip find his gear?

stories.title: The Garden Mystery
sentences: In a cozy little garden, a friendly snail named Shelly discovered that her favourite daisy had lost all its petals overnight.
Shelly asked the wise old owl perched on the oak tree, "Who could have done this?"
The owl pointed his wing towards a trail of tiny paw prints leading to the strawberry patch.
There, Shelly found a fluffy rabbit named Ruby, who had used the petals to decorate her birthday cake.
Ruby apologized and invited Shelly to the party, where they shared strawberry lemonade and danced under the moonlight.

questions.question: What did Shelly discover was missing from her daisy?
Who did Shelly ask for help?
What had Ruby used the petals for?

stories.title: The Star Wisher
sentences: Every night, a little girl named Luna gazed out her window and wished upon the brightest star in the sky.
One evening, the star blinked back at her and floated down, landing softly in her backyard.
The star, named Sparkle, had lost its glow and needed a happy memory to shine again.
Luna shared her happiest memory — the day she learned to ride her bicycle — and Sparkle absorbed the joy.
With its glow restored, Sparkle soared back into the sky, shining brighter than ever, and winked at Luna every night.

questions.question: What did Sparkle need to regain its glow?
What was the name of the little girl?
What did Luna share with Sparkle?
